prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic dreamy lifestyle photograph in a vertical 4:5 frame, shot from a close low-angle perspective, showing a young East Asian couple sitting casually on the roof edge of a vintage turquoise van in a wildflower field. The man sits on the left in a loose white button-up shirt, cream pants, and white sneakers, one knee raised and one leg hanging over the van; the woman sits on the right in a light pastel yellow floral summer dress and white sneakers, legs dangling naturally, holding a small pink flower near her face while smiling softly toward him. Add a cluster of exactly 7 pastel balloons tied beside the woman on the right: 3 pale blue, 2 cream yellow, and 2 very light aqua balloons, with thin white strings. The background is a wide clean soft blue sky with large negative space and a few faint clouds near the horizon. Integrate white hand-drawn diary-style doodles and text directly into the sky: exactly 4 handwritten phrases reading good days, stay close, happy place, and B-. Include exactly 15 white doodle elements around the sky: 1 smiley face, 1 outlined flower, 1 heart, 1 cloud, 1 large starburst, 4 small sparkle stars, 1 tiny asterisk sparkle, 3 small hearts under the center phrase, and 2 small flower drawings on balloons. Use bright natural daylight, soft overexposed highlights, dreamy glow, pastel film tones, low contrast, smooth highlight roll-off, airy youthful summer mood, turquoise and sky-blue palette with soft white, pastel yellow, and pastel pink accents. Keep the composition intimate, peaceful, whimsical, and clean, with the couple and van roof occupying the lower half and the illustrated sky filling the upper half.
